install.headline: Connect your first repository
install.subtext: CodeShield reviews every pull request automatically — catching bugs, security issues, and performance regressions before they reach production.
install.step1Desc: Authorize CodeShield on the repositories you want to protect.
install.step2Title: Open or update a pull request
install.step2Desc: Push a branch and open a PR — CodeShield triggers automatically.
install.step3Desc: Specialist agents analyze your code and post inline comments within seconds.

landing.heroHeadline: Automated code review that reads your pull requests like a senior engineer.
landing.heroSubtext: CodeShield integrates directly into your GitHub workflow to provide deep technical insights, security catches, and performance optimizations before you merge.
landing.specialistsSubtitle: We deploy a swarm of specialized agents, each trained on specific engineering disciplines.
landing.securityItem1: Unsanitized user input in ORM queries
landing.performanceItem1: N+1 query patterns in data loops
landing.reviewSubtitle: Switch between specialists to see how they analyze a real-world code snippet.
landing.pathTraversalDesc: The application saves files using the original filename without validation. An attacker could use ../ to overwrite sensitive system files.
landing.pathTraversalFix: Use os.path.basename() or a secure filename generator...
landing.n1QueryDesc: Each loop iteration executes a separate database query. With 1000 users this results in 1001 queries. Use a JOIN or eager loading.
landing.layerViolationDesc: The controller directly imports and calls the email service, creating tight coupling. Use dependency injection via constructor parameters.
landing.layerViolationFix: Inject EmailService via constructor, call self._email.send()...
landing.archSubtitle: Built for speed, reliability, and security. We process reviews in seconds, not minutes.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Simple, predictable plans for projects of all sizes.
landing.ctaSubtext: Takes less than 2 minutes to connect your first repository.
